Class ReactiveZSetCommands.BZPopCommand

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.data.redis.connection.ReactiveRedisConnection.KeyCommand
org.springframework.data.redis.connection.ReactiveZSetCommands.BZPopCommand
All Implemented Interfaces:
ReactiveRedisConnection.Command
Enclosing interface:
ReactiveZSetCommands
public static class ReactiveZSetCommands.BZPopCommand extends ReactiveRedisConnection.KeyCommand
BZPOPMIN/BZPOPMAX command parameters.
Since:
2.6
Author:
Mark Paluch

      public static ReactiveZSetCommands.BZPopCommand min()

    • from

      public ReactiveZSetCommands.BZPopCommand from(ByteBuffer key)
      Applies the key. Constructs a new command instance with all previously configured properties.
      Parameters:
      key - must not be null.
      Returns:
      a new ReactiveZSetCommands.BZPopCommand with value applied.

      Returns:

    • blockingFor

      public ReactiveZSetCommands.BZPopCommand blockingFor(Duration timeout)
      Applies a timeout. Constructs a new command instance with all previously configured properties.
      Parameters:
      timeout - must not be null.
      Returns:
      a new ReactiveZSetCommands.BZPopCommand with timeout applied.

    • blockingFor

      public ReactiveZSetCommands.BZPopCommand blockingFor(long timeout, TimeUnit timeUnit)
      Applies a timeout. Constructs a new command instance with all previously configured properties.
      Parameters:
      timeout - value.
      timeUnit - must not be null.
      Returns:
      a new ReactiveZSetCommands.BZPopCommand with timeout applied.
